title: helichrysum concursum
intro: Helichrysum concursum, also known as African Everlasting or Yellow Bush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum concursum include its ability to improve circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
